overall.description: Cinematic footage from a Harry Potter video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing the Great Hall with students in robes dining at long wooden tables. Sunlight streams through tall Gothic stained glass windows while floating candles illuminate the vaulted ceiling, creating a warm magical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle dining hall with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall from a fixed vantage point near the dining tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at table eating and conversing with classmates
student in dark robes seated with back to camera, facing the table

entered.detail: tall arched stained glass windows with intricate designs allowing golden sunlight to stream through
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
lengthy dark wood dining tables laden with food and plates
grey stone walls with Gothic architectural details and arches
high ornate ceiling with wooden beams and magical floating candles

segments.scene_description: A cinematic view of the Great Hall in a magical castle, filled with students in dark robes dining at long wooden tables. Golden morning light streams through towering Gothic stained glass windows on the left, while hundreds of floating candles hang from the vaulted ceiling above. The camera remains stationary, capturing the ambient activity of students eating and conversing in this grand indoor space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, cinematic view of the Great Hall, capturing a moment of morning tranquility within the magical castle. It begins by focusing on the grand scale of the indoor space, where students in dark robes are gathered for a meal at long wooden tables. As the eye wanders, the scene emphasizes the interplay of light, with golden morning rays streaming through towering Gothic stained glass windows on the left. This warmth blends with the soft glow of hundreds of floating candles suspended from the vaulted ceiling above. The camera remains still, allowing the ambient activity of students eating and conversing to define the atmosphere of the hall.
